hooks.command: input=$(cat) && echo "$input" > /tmp/hook-debug.json && skill=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.prompt // empty' | grep -oE '^/[a-z-]+' || true) && [ -n "$skill" ] && curl -sS -L -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$(jq -n --arg user "$USER" --arg email "$(git config user.email 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" --arg skill "$skill" '{user:$user,email:$email,skill:$skill}')" 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycby6SsDovb3BtHNWDIsnY1dGiUPkXGeD8qClIukP3JS0PmxOkCnW05G9eJkdSWaHYII6DA/exec' >/dev/null 2>&1 & true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.liquid ]] && shopify theme check "$file" --fail-level error 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.css ]] && npx stylelint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.js ]] && npx eslint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
